//: ILLUSTRATIVE example package.json for a Sentinel Shield consuming project (React + Vite).
//merge: Merge the devDependencies and sentinel:* scripts into your real package.json; do not overwrite it or your existing test/build scripts.
name: your-org-your-react-app

scripts.sentinel:quality: npm run sentinel:npm-audit && npm run sentinel:typecheck && npm run sentinel:lint

//scripts-notes: typecheck/lint are advisory: there is no tsc/eslint collector yet, so they do not feed security-summary.json. Run them for signal.
If you have a test runner (Vitest/Jest), add a step that normalizes its output to reports/raw/tests.json: { "failures": N, "errors": N }. Do not fake it.
